nasb.text: I have come as Light into the world, so that everyone who believes in Me will not remain in darkness.

esv.text: I have come into the world as light, so that whoever believes in me may not remain in darkness.

cnv.text: 我是光，我到世上來，叫所有信我的不住在黑暗裡。

ccb.text: 我来是要作世界的光，好叫信我的人脱离黑暗。

csbs.text: 我就是光。我来到世上，好让所有信我的人不住在黑暗里。
